app.name: Fresh Paint
app.description: Unleash your inner creative with Fresh Paint – the ultimate canvas for your big ideas. Fresh Paint is a fun and easy to use painting app with the right tools for artists of all ages. We believe that brilliant, creative ideas can come from anyone, anytime. It’s time to set your creativity free.

app.name: DrayAI
app.description: DrayAI is an AI app for the 10Store! Chat to DrayAI, or play music "Play Shout or Play Never Gunna Give You Up" to stop say "Stop" Have a nice day!

app.name: BrowserQuest
app.description: BrowserQuest is a small multiplayer game inviting you to explore a world of adventure from your Windows device.

app.name: VLC UWP
app.description: VLC is the ultimate media player, ported to the Windows Universal Platform. ⚠ ⚠ Beware! This VLC does not feature all the features of the classic VLC! It does not support DVD or Blurays! Use the desktop version instead! ⚠⚠

app.name: PosXP
app.description: Cash register POS software for bars and small shops. Very simple to use and fast.

app.name: Paint 3D
app.description: Whether you’re an artist or just want to try out some doodles–Paint 3D makes it easy to unleash your creativity and bring your ideas to life. Classic Paint has been reimagined, with an updated look and feel and a ton of new brushes and tools. And now, create in every dimension. Make 2D masterpieces

app.name: Minecraft for Windows 10 Mobile
app.description: Explore randomly generated worlds and build amazing things from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles. Play in creative mode with unlimited resources or mine deep into the world in survival mode, crafting weapons and armor to fend off the dangerous mobs.

app.name: Minecraft for Windows
app.description: Explore randomly generated worlds and build amazing things from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles. Play in creative mode with unlimited resources or mine deep into the world in survival mode, crafting weapons and armor to fend off the dangerous mobs.

app.name: Hill Climb Racing
app.description: One of the most addictive and entertaining physics based driving game ever made! And it's free! Meet Newton Bill, the young aspiring uphill racer. He is about to embark on a journey that takes him to where no ride has ever been before. With little respect to the laws of physics

app.name: Microsoft Edge Unofficial
app.description: Microsoft Edge for Windows Phone

app.name: Transport Empire
app.description: Transport Empire is a real-time strategy management game where players have to build a transport empire, constructing commercial networks, mines, factories, and much more. Your aim in Transport Empire is to build the biggest commercial network in the world with a steampunk aesthetic. To achieve tha

app.name: Disney Crossy Road
app.description: Disney Crossy Road is a new version of the original Crossy Road, featuring all your favorite Disney characters. There are over a hundred different characters available, from movies like Toy Story, Zootopia, The Lion King, The Haunted Mansion, Tangled, Wreck-It Ralph, and many others.

app.name: Samsung Gallery
app.description: Samsung Gallery for Windows Phone

app.name: App Installer
app.description: Microsoft App Installer for Windows Phone

app.name: 7digital Music Store
app.description: 7digital Music Store emerges as a comprehensive app for high-quality music enthusiasts, offering an expansive library of over 40 million tracks across diverse genres. This globally available app extends its reach to music aficionados in 42 countries, delivering an experience characterized by fairnes

app.name: YouTube TV Touch
app.description: A YouTube for TV port to Windows Phone.

app.name: Cut the Rope
app.description: Get ready to feed the adorable Om Nom in Cut The Rope, a mind-bending puzzle game packed with levels of fun! Your task? To cut ropes in just the right way to deliver candy to Om Nom's mouth. Each level brings a new challenge, featuring various mechanics and obstacles. From gravity-defying swings to

app.name: AdBlocker
app.description: A adblocker app for W10M. YOUR PHONE MUST BE INTEROP UNLOCKED! More info at https://files.catbox.moe/rokw5h.txt (please note you got to copy it to the browser)

app.name: myTube!
app.description: A YouTube client. You need the API Keys for it to work

app.name: Unigram Mobile Messenger
app.description: Unigram Mobile is a fork of the original Unigram UWP app aimed to keep supporting Windows 10 Mobile after the Unigram dropped support for Mobile.

app.name: Dominoes
app.description: Play the BEST dominoes game for Windows today! Enjoy the simple pleasures of this classic game on your computer, laptop, or tablet. Play 3 classic game modes (Muggins, Block, and Draw) against a clever computer opponent. Custom themes and backgrounds round out this spectacular game.
A 2048 game.

app.name: Radon Browser for 10Store
app.description: A version of Radon Browser made for 10Store.

app.name: myTube! Beta
app.description: Watch YouTube videos on your Lumia device.

app.name: Shazam
app.description: Find the music your currently listening to with Shazam!

app.name: Hill Climb Racing (Win 8.1)
app.description: You can download Win 8.1 version, if Windows 10 version is not downloading.

app.name: Kinectimals Unleashed
app.description: A special version of the family game from the Xbox 360 console, designed for users of tablets and computers with Windows 8. The game allows us to take care of one of several dozen virtual animals with which we can play, following the growth and development of our pet. We must also ensure that the ba

app.name: Twitter (Bluetweety)
app.description: X (formerly Twitter) is a major microblogging and social networking service where users post short, 280-character messages, known as "tweets," which can include text, images, videos, and links.

app.name: Global Clock Tile
app.description: The app displays the time, day of the week and the date in the tile on start screen. Please make sure you open the app first and allow it to lock screen for the tile update to work. Then, you can pin it to your start screen.

app.name: Despicable Me - Minion Rush
app.description: if won't work, it needs game assets download it from https://archive.org/details/despicable-me-minion-rush-archive dont delete it please, it need

app.name: Doodle Jump
app.description: This is Doodle Jump for Windows 10 not for Windows phone since they already have one.

app.name: We Become What We Behold
app.description: This is a unofficial port of We Become What we Behold. Please ask me on Discord if you need help or feedback or ask another person. Original Game: https://ncase.itch.io/wbwwb

app.name: 4shared (x86)
app.description: 4shared is like a large virtual folder for your data. You can access your files anytime you need, being sure that they are always kept safe in your 4shared account. In addition, 4shared enables you to share links to your content with others.

app.name: 4shared (x64)
app.description: 4shared is like a large virtual folder for your data. You can access your files anytime you need, being sure that they are always kept safe in your 4shared account. In addition, 4shared enables you to share links to your content with others.

app.name: 4shared (ARM)
app.description: 4shared is like a large virtual folder for your data. You can access your files anytime you need, being sure that they are always kept safe in your 4shared account. In addition, 4shared enables you to share links to your content with others.

app.name: 8Store
app.description: 8Store Revival, a huge project which needs YOUR help to be better. We are now keep uploading apps to 8Store, and currently hitting 120+ apps in the first day's release! that is impressive and not gonna lie.

app.name: Browser
app.description: Used for testing apps on Webview1

app.name: 3D Builder
app.description: the version may be incorrect

app.name: MSN Weather (newRetiled)
app.description: MSN Weather: The best way to plan your day. Get the latest weather conditions, whether you're hitting the slopes, or the beach, or checking the forecast for your commute. See accurate 10-day and hourly forecasts for whatever you do. Patched with newRetiled, credit to migbrunluz. ...

app.name: Adobe Photoshop Express
app.description: Download Photoshop Express and start exploring. Edit photos and videos, add creative effects, and more with Photoshop Express.

app.name: MSN Health & Fitness (newRetiled)
app.description: MSN Health & Fitness helps you keep track of your health, check activities, workouts, nutrition and others. Patched with newRetiled, credit to migbrunluz.

app.name: Collection of Windows Startup Sounds
app.description: Explore the collection of startup and shutdown sounds used in various versions of Windows operating systems. This application also has startup and shutdown sounds from unreleased versions of Windows, including Windows NT 5.0 beta and Windows Longhorn! Get great insight and fun facts on various sounds from the \"Did you Know\" boxes. Enjoy beautiful pictures, many of which show the packaging of the retail release of a particular Windows version. Note: Windows is a Trademark of Microsoft Corporation. The logos and sounds used in this application are own by Microsoft Corporation and are used for educational purposes only.

app.name: Comix
app.description: Comix is a comic reader supporting CBZ, CBR, CB7, ZIP, RAR, and 7z formats. For everyone who have a small or large collection, a library mode allows you to browse your books by cover, just select the folder / folders where you store your collections. It supports unlimited subfolders and switch the view between Books and Folders (sub collections) The reader allows pages to be maximised, fit to screen, rotated, joined and browse in thumbnail mode. You can also share individual pages using the Share Charm. Full support for landscape and portrait mode, when in landscape you can read in double page mode. You can switch the reading, and gestures. Left to Right - Right to Left You can mark your books as read in your local library and filter them in your collections. Please see the features below for help on usage. Thanks to everyone for your comments, requests and support. Please continue sending your emails at support.comix@objectspaces.info or in our facebook page http://www.facebook.com/comixwindows. In the unlikely event there is a bug please report them at the same email. NOTE: We cannot respond to reviews so please contact us directly for any request or issue.

app.name: News Live Tiles
app.description: Are you also missing a live tile for your favorite news site? With News Live Tiles you can easily create them yourselves within seconds! The live tiles will update automatically with the latest news from the site. - Notifications and live tile updates for new news items - Support for almost all news sites - Find the settings of your favorite site via the search function - Pin sites from in the sample collection for free; for other sites an in-app purchase is required - Universal app (Windows and Windows Phone versions): the in-app purchase is valid for both, and your collection is synced between both Copyright on the news from the feeds remains at its owners. If you would like to have your feed removed from the in-app collection, please contact newslivetiles@outlook.com.

app.name: Lenovo Support
app.description: Lenovo PC Support

app.name: TuneIn Radio (newRetiled)
app.description: TuneIn Radio is a new way to listen to music, sports, and news from every corner of the earth, with over 60,000 radio stations and 2 million on-demand programs.

app.name: 00's Radio
app.description: radio station live

app.name: VCLibs 110 (x86)
app.description: Dependency made for Windows 8.0 applications.

app.name: VCLibs 120 (x64)
app.description: Dependency made for Windows 8.1 applications.

app.name: Sonic Dash
app.description: Endless runner action has never been faster with Sonic Dash! Feel the speed in this mobile adventure game as you navigate fun 3D runner race courses with Sonic the Hedgehog, Knuckles, Tails, Shadow, and more. Collect rings, race past challenging obstacles, and battle epic bosses in this fast running game by SEGA! Sonic Dash is a fun run game for kids and adults alike.

app.name: Media PlayReady 2 x64
app.description: Dependency usually for multimedia apps

app.name: Windows Camera
app.description: Use Windows Camera application to take photos and record videos using your laptop's webcam or external webcam. App is x64.

app.name: Windows Photos
app.description: Use Windows Photos application to organize your photos, make albums. You can use this app in pair with Windows Camera to import the photos from your external device. You can also connect to SkyDrive or Flickr to get photos from your friends and your cloud. This app is 8.0 compatible and also x64.

app.name: Flappy Bird
app.description: Flappy Bird is a 2013 casual mobile game developed by Vietnamese video game artist and programmer Dong Nguyen (Vietnamese: Nguy\u1ec5n H\u00e0 \u0110\u00f4ng), under his game development company .Gears.[1] The game is a side-scroller where the player controls a bird, Faby, attempting to fly between columns of green pipes without hitting them. The player's score is determined by the number of pipes they pass. Nguyen created the game over a period of several days, using the bird from a cancelled game made in 2012.

app.name: ChrisRLillo Music
app.description: Discover the world of Chrisrlillo in a sleek, modern Metro interface designed for Windows 8. This app brings the full experience of Chrisrlillo\u2019s music directly to your Start screen, offering fast, touch-friendly navigation and a clean design that feels right at home.

app.name: Surface Hub
app.description: Learn more about your Microsoft Surface RT/Pro/Go within this

app.name: Mail, Calendar and People (8.1)
app.description: Productivity apps: Mail, Calendar and People. Mail for checking emails, Calendar for managing calendar events, People for social media. We bundle the 3 apps into 1 so it's way easier to install. NOTE: We have ended support for these apps on 31.12.2024., but you can continue using them.

app.name: Survivalcraft 2
app.description: Infinite, destructible block world with seasons Design your own furniture Pistons Over 30 types of animals Ride horses, camels and donkeys Living world with day/night cycle, dynamic water and physics Electric circuits and logic gates, make your own video game Fire, explosives, dynamic water and magma Realistic survival simulation Download furniture, maps, skins created by community Over 300 items of clothing affecting your looks and survival Deserts, jungles, plains, snow, ocean, lakes, swamps, islands Crafting and smelting Split screen

app.name: DrayAI Spanish
app.description: DrayAI is an AI app for the 10Store! Chat to DrayAI, or play music "Play Shout or Play Never Gunna Give You Up" to stop say "Stop" Have a nice day!

app.name: Trainspotting Metro
app.description: Use this app to watch live UK train streams.

app.name: Hive FM
app.description: Hive FM app
